Dear Sir/Madam,


(LETTERSUBJECT)


2. We are pleased to inform you that the item reserved by you had be returned and it's available for you to be borrowed.Please obtain the item within (COLLECTIONDAYS) days from the issue date of this letter.


3. Do inform us if you need to cancel that reservation.

: (TITLE)

: (CALLNO)

: (ISBN)

Thank You.





Yours sincerely,



(OFFICERNAME)
